clause.title: Roofing of liquid trade waste generation areas

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: When a liquid trade waste generating process does not fully occur within a building, suitable roofing must prevent the entry of stormwater to the disposal system.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: When a liquid trade waste generating process occurs within a building where one or more sides are open to the weather, a vertical overhang of a minimum of 10° from the roofing must be provided.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where the wind driven rainwater is likely to enter under the roof in extreme storm conditions, the roof must overhang by a minimum of 10° from the roofing.

callout.p: TAS Figure E3D3 provides an example of a suitable installation practice to meet the requirements of E3D3(3).
